w:r.w:t: Buddy Engineerz Tech Pack Generator (BETPG) is a web-based application designed to automate the creation of garment tech packs for clothing brands.

The application eliminates the need for PowerPoint, Illustrator, and Excel-based tech pack creation by generating production-ready tech packs from reusable templates, measurements, artwork assets, labels, and print specifications.
The primary objective is to reduce tech pack creation time from 30–60 minutes to less than 3 minutes.
Difficult to scale to hundreds of designs
Store all reusable information in a database and automatically generate tech packs.
Store size charts once and reuse across products.
Each tech pack must support versioning.
Store all assets in AWS S3.
Generate a complete professional tech pack in under 3 minutes with less than 5 user inputs.
